attacks.name: Swamp Sludge
attacks.description: Perform an avoidable normal attack. Deals your normal damage + ${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your Magic level.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an <avoidable> normal attack, dealing your normal damage + <damage>. Consumes Runes per hit.

attacks.name: Bloodboil
attacks.description: Perform an attack that deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% (150% if the enemy is poisoned) of your normal damage. On a hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Burn that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the enemy's max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s. If the enemy is Burning, has a ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to inflict Deadly Poison that deals ${onHitEffect1DamageMaxValue0}% of the enemy's max hit points as damage over ${onHitEffect1duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an attack that deals <damage>. On a hit <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Toxic Siphon
attacks.description: Perform an attack that deals up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage. On a hit, heals for ${lifesteal}% of damage dealt, and has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Deadly Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the enemy's max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an attack that deals up to <damage>. On a hit <hitEffect>, and <attacker> <attis> healed for <lifesteal> of damage dealt.

attacks.name: Barbed Tail Whip
attacks.description: The enemy's barbed tail whips at you, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage (Unavoidable). On a hit, ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Stun for ${onHitEffect0turns} turns. If you are already stunned, perform a regular attack instead.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <AttPos> barbed tail whips at <target>, dealing <damage> damage (<Avoidable>) and <hitEffect>. If <target> <taris> already stunned, perform a regular attack instead.

attacks.name: Barbed Projectiles
attacks.description: Rapidly fires ${hitCount} unavoidable barbed projectiles dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} each. Each hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Deadly Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of your max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Rapidly fires <count> barbed projectiles dealing <damage> (<Avoidable>). On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Toxic Clouds
attacks.description: Noxious gas erupts from around the enemy, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}x${hitCount} damage over ${duration}s. On a hit inflicts Deadly Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of your max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Noxious gas erupts within the <attPos> vicinity, dealing <damage>x<count> damage over <duration> and <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Summon Cobralings
attacks.description: The enemy makes a normal attack, dealing up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of its normal damage (can miss), then summons ${hitCount} cobralings, each dealing between ${attackDamageMinValue1}-${attackDamageMaxValue1}x${hitCount} damage over ${duration}s. On a hit, the cobralings have a ${onHitEffect0chance}% to inflict Deadly Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of your max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.

attacks.name: Pounce - Tiger Form
attacks.description: Pounce at you, knocking you down and applies Bleed that deals 15% of your current hitpoints over 10s on a hit. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Charge at <target>, knocking <target> down and <hitEffect> on a hit. Deals <damage> damage.

attacks.name: Beak - Raven Form
attacks.description: Assault your eyes with his beak ${hitCount} times, blinding you (-20% Accuracy Rating) for 5 turns. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Assault <target>'s eyes, <hitEffect> on a hit. Deals <damage> damage.

attacks.name: Sleepytime
attacks.description: Deals no damage, but instead puts you to Sleep for 2 turns. Unavoidable.

attacks.name: Arcane Barrier
attacks.description: The enemy gains +50% Evasion Ratings and +25% Damage Reduction for 3 turns.

attacks.name: Magical Missiles
attacks.description: Flings ${hitCount} unavoidable magical missiles towards you, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue1} + ${attackDamageMinValue0}-${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage each.

attacks.name: Spook
attacks.description: Deals no damage. Inflicts Fear for 2 turns.

attacks.name: Reanimate
attacks.description: Reanimates a pile of bones into a protective ward, granting the Necromancer +30% Damage Reduction and +25% Reflect Damage for 3 turns.

attacks.name: Oops, Pulled On the Wrong Wall Sconce
attacks.description: The treasure hunter accidentally pulls on the wrong wall sconce, which deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage. On a hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply Burn. Unvoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> pulls on the wrong wall sconce, which deals <damage> damage and inflicts <hitEffect>. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Goddam Mummies!
attacks.description: The treasure hunter searches a sarcophagus, from which emerges a mummy! It deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage on hit. On a hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply 5 stacks of Affliction. Avoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> searches a sarcophagus, from which emerges a mummy that deals <damage> damage and inflicts <hitEffect> on hit. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Ahhh, It's a Mimic!
attacks.description: The treasure hunter points you to a chest, but it turns out, it's actually a Mimic! It deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage on hit. On a hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Poison. Avoidable.

attacks.name: Holy Toledo, It's Raining Gold!
attacks.description: Piles of gold hidden in the ceiling rain down on your head. It deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage each time it hits you, ${hitCount} times. Avoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Piles of gold fall on your head, dealing <damage> each hit, <hitCount> times. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: I Thought it Said "Fill My Purse", not "Kill With Curse"!
attacks.description: The treasure hunter reads strange runes the wrong way, causing a random Curse and a random Elemental effect. Unavoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Strange runes cause a random Curse and Elemental effect. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: Pretty Sure This Button Will Reveal the Treasure Room...
attacks.description: The treasure hunter presses a button which...causes you to turn to stone for 3 turns. Unavoidable.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Piles of gold fall on your head, dealing <damage> each hit, <hitCount> times. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: There It Is: The Treasure Room!
attacks.description: The treasure hunter finds the Treasure Room!
attacks.descriptionGenerator: The treasure hunter finds the Treasure Room!

attacks.name: Burrow
attacks.description: Burrows into the ground, becoming immune to all attacks but unable to attack for 3 turns.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.description: Stamp the ground ${hitCount} times over ${duration}s, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage each, each with a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance on hit to inflict Stun for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn (Avoidable).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Slam the ground <count> times over <duration>, dealing <damage> damage each (<Avoidable>). On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Dual Hit
attacks.description: Make two normal attacks.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> makes two normal attacks.

attacks.name: Defiling Strike
attacks.description: Make an Unavoidable normal attack.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> makes an <avoidable> normal attack.

attacks.name: Charge
attacks.description: Charge at you, knocking you back and applies stun for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn on a hit. Deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Charge at <target>, knocking <target> back and <hitEffect> on a hit. Deals <damage> damage.

attacks.name: Elemental Breath
attacks.description: Breathe unavoidable elemental dragonfire that deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}x${hitCount} damage over ${duration}s. Inflicts either Burn, Freeze, Sleep, or Stun (10% chance each).
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Breathe <avoidable> elemental dragonfire that deals <damage>x<count> damage over <duration>. <HitEffect>.

attacks.name: Harpiar's Song
attacks.description: Attack ${hitCount} times, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage each hit (unavoidable if Accuracy Rating is greater than or equal to 20,000). On hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply sleep for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <count> times, dealing <damage> each hit (<avoidable> if Accuracy Rating is 20,000+). On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Flame_Lash
attacks.description: The enemy lashes out with a fiery whip ${hitCount} times, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of its Magic level + 1, with a 50% chance to has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Burn that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the your current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> lashes out with a fiery whip <count> times, dealing <damage>, with a 50% chance to <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: Rollin' Rollin'
attacks.description: The Rock Giant rolls its body around like a massive boulder, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of its normal damage plus ${attackDamageMaxValue1} and applies stun for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: The <attacker> rolls <attPos> body around like a massive boulder, dealing <damage> and <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: One-Two Punch
attacks.description: Attack ${hitCount} times, dealing up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage on the first attack and up to ${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your max hit on the second attack. Has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to strike with a Sucker Punch, stunning the enemy for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <count> times, dealing <damage>, <hitEffect>

attacks.name: Sucker Punch
attacks.description: The enemy strikes with a sucker punch, dealing a whopping ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their normal damage, which has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply stun for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> sucker punches <target>, dealing a <damage>, that <hitEffect> on hit.

attacks.name: Wild Strikes
attacks.description: Make ${hitCount} consecutive attacks, each dealing up to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage, but -${preHitEffect0modValue0}% Global Evasion that stacks up to ${preHitEffect0maxStacks} times until the end of the fight
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make <count> consecutive attacks, each dealing up to <damage>, but <attacker> <prehitEffect>

attacks.name: Anguished Cry
attacks.description: The enemy lets out a gut-wrenching wail, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of its max hit. Has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to apply Fear for ${onHitEffect0turns} turn and has a ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to apply the Anguish I Curse for 3 turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> lets out a gut-wrenching wail, dealing <damage>. <HitEffect>.

attacks.name: Drown
attacks.description: Attempts to drown the enemy in sorrow, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} + 100% damage if the target is cursed.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Attacker> attempts to drown <target> in sorrow, dealing <damage>.

attacks.name: Zombie Summon
attacks.description: Perform a regular attack. On use, summon a Zombie Hand that attacks for 42 damage.

attacks.name: Zombie Summon
attacks.description: Summon a Zombie Hand to attack once, dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage (Can miss)..
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack once dealing <damage> damage (<CanMiss>).

attacks.name: Zephyr Strike
attacks.description: Attack ${hitCount} times for ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage each. If your Accuracy Rating is higher than 20K then this attack can't miss.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <count> times for <damage> damage each. If your Accuracy Rating is higher than 20K then this attack <canMiss>.

attacks.name: Cold Snap
attacks.description: Attack ${hitCount} times for ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage each (Can miss). On a hit, gives the enemy +${onHitEffect0modValue0}% Attack Interval for ${onHitEffect0turns} of the enemy's turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <count> times for <damage> damage each (<CanMiss>). On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Avalanche
attacks.description: Attack ${hitCount} times dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage each (Can miss). On a hit, puts the enemy to sleep for ${onHitEffect0turns} of the enemy's turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack <count> times dealing <damage> damage each (<CanMiss>). On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Fierce Flames
attacks.description: Attack once dealing ${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage (Can miss). On a hit, has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Burn that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the enemy's current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack once dealing <damage> damage (<CanMiss>). On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Stormsnap
attacks.description: Perform an unavoidable attack that deals damage equal to 200%-400% of the Enemy's Magic level + 1.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an <avoidable> attack that deals <damage>.

attacks.name: Dual Attack
attacks.description: Always perform ${hitCount} consecutive attacks that deal ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% normal damage.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Always perform <count> consecutive attacks that deal <damage>.

attacks.name: Crushing Triple Slash
attacks.description: Perform 3 attacks that deal ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of your normal damage on the 1st attack, ${attackDamageMaxValue1}% of your normal damage on the 2nd, and ${attackDamageMaxValue2}% of your normal damage on the 3rd.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform 3 attacks that deal <damage>.

attacks.name: Deadly Cut
attacks.description: Perform a regular attack. On a hit, inflicts Bleed that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0} and ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue1}% of the enemy's max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s. If your Accuracy Rating is higher than 30k then this attack can't miss.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform a regular attack. On a hit, <hitEffect>. If your Accuracy Rating is higher than 30k then this attack <canMiss>.

attacks.name: Serpent's Bite
attacks.description: Perform an attack that deals ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% (125% if the enemy is poisoned) of your normal damage. On a hit has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% chance to inflict Poison that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the enemy's max hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Perform an attack that deals <damage>. On a hit <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Death
attacks.description: (Unavoidable.) The target is instantly killed. If immune to Instakill, the target instead takes damage equal to ${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their Max HP.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: <Avoidable>. Kills the target instantly. If immune to Instakill, takes <damage> instead.

attacks.name: Feelin' Frosty?
attacks.description: A ray of biting cold pierces the target, dealing damage equal to 1 + ${attackDamageMinValue0}%-${attackDamageMaxValue0}% of their Magic level. On hit, Slows the target for ${onHitEffect1modValue0}%, and has a ${onHitEffect0chance}% to Freeze the target for ${onHitEffect0turns} of its turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Make an attack that deals <damage>. On hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Polymorph: Oops! (0.001% Chance)
attacks.description: Oops! Turns YOU into a harmless cow for 1 turn.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Oops! Turns YOU into a harmless cow for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Polymorph: Cow
attacks.description: Turns the target into a harmless cow for 3 turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Turns the target into a harmless cow for 3 turns.

attacks.name: Lightning Arc
attacks.description: An arc of lightning zaps the target ${hitCount} times over ${duration}s, dealing ${attackDamageMinValue0}-${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage on the first hit, ${attackDamageMinValue1}-${attackDamageMaxValue1} damage on the second hit, and ${attackDamageMinValue2}-${attackDamageMaxValue2} damage on the third hit. Each hit applies 1 stack of Shock (-5% Accuracy, up to 10 stacks) and has a ${onHitEffect1chance}% chance to apply Stun for ${onHitEffect1turns} turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: An arc of lightning zaps the <target> dealing <damage> damage <count> times over <duration>. On a hit, <hitEffect>. <Avoidable>.

attacks.name: FIREBALL!
attacks.description: Launch an avoidable fireball that deals ${attackDamageMinValue0}-${attackDamageMaxValue0} damage. On a hit, inflicts Burn that deals ${onHitEffect0DamageMaxValue0}% of the target's current hitpoints as damage over ${onHitEffect0duration}s.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Launch an <avoidable> fireball that deals <damage> damage. On a hit, <hitEffect>.

attacks.name: Wild Strike
attacks.description: Attack twice for 60%. On hit, inflict a 100% Bleed on the Enemy, then gain -10% Attack Interval for 2 turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Heartseeker
attacks.description: Attack for 80% + 7.5-10.5% of Enemy's current HP.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Deadly Delivery
attacks.description: Attack for 110%. Inflict 2 stacks of Vulnerability on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Crippling Strike
attacks.description: Attack for 70%. Inflict a 30% Slow for 1 turn and a 100% Bleed.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Disrupting Stab
attacks.description: Attack for 45%. Removes Enemy buffs. Enemy can't receive buffs for 2 turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Wide Slash
attacks.description: Gain +30% Evasion for 1 turn. Then, attack in an arc (2 attacks) for 120% each.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.description: Attack 8 times for 35% each.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: True Strike
attacks.description: Guaranteed hit for 100% + 25-50% of the Enemy's Damage Resistance.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Counterattack
attacks.description: Block all incoming attacks for 1 turn. Then, after 3.6s, perform a counterattack for 100%, and inflict a 20% Slow for 2 turns.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

attacks.name: Pommel Bash
attacks.description: Attack for 140%, inflicting Daze on the Enemy for 2 turns on hit.
attacks.descriptionGenerator: Attack

combatEffectTemplates.description: Endpoint Template. Defines behaviours for an effect that: Interrupts a character's turn when applied; prevents them from attacking, evading, or regenerating barrier; and causes them to take 100% more damage. Also grants immunity to stun-likes for 3 turns.
An effect that applies stacks of modifiers. Stacks are increased by 1 each time the character misses with an attack. The effect is removed if the character hits with an attack, or combat ends.

tooltipSpans.value:
-2% to all positive effects and values
+2% to all negative effects and values

-4% to all positive effects and values
+4% to all negative effects and values
Immune to Curses, Fear, Poison, and Sleep. Vulnerable to Silver.
+50% resistance against Melee and Ranged attacks from non-silver weapons and ammunition.
Takes extra damage from crushing weapons, such as hammers.
Takes extra damage from stabbing weapons, such as daggers.
Takes extra damage from slashing weapons, such as scimitars.
Takes extra damage from silver weapons and ammunition.

combatPassives.name: Phase HP = 182 / 1,820
combatPassives.customDescription: Each phase (excluding the final phase) of this boss is limited to 10% of its total maximum hitpoints.

combatPassives.name: One With the Unholy
combatPassives.customDescription: Immunity to Curses, +30% lifesteal, +5% rebirth chance

combatPassives.name: The Wickedly Unholy Necromancer's Blessing of Undeath
The Roof! The Roof! The Roof is On Fire!
Monsters, Monsters Everywhere!
combatPassives.customDescription: You take 5% of your max HP when you hit with an attack, and deal -5% damage per Effect you are affected by.

combatPassives.name: This Place Is, Like, Cursed, Man
combatPassives.customDescription: Gain a Random Curse at the Start of the Fight and whenever you are hit by an attack.

combatPassives.name: Burrow
combatPassives.customDescription: When the Giant Mole reaches 50% health, there is a 25% chance per Player hit that she will burrow beneath the ground for 3 turns, making her immune to all attacks but unable to attack. This cannot activate when her HP reaches 5% or less.

combatPassives.name: Unfair Boss Immunities
combatPassives.customDescription: Immune to Stun, Stunlikes, Poison, Fear, Drowsy, and Sleep

combatPassives.name: Dark Energy Core
combatPassives.customDescription: A little alien asshole follows you around, applying 1 stack of Dark Energy Sap, reducing your max HP by 2.5% per hit (30% chance, up to 10 stacks) and healing the Beast by 0.5% of its max HP. When the Beast reaches 50% HP, the Core gives it 10% lifesteal and regen equal to 0.5% of the Beast's max HP.

combatPassives.name: Stab Me or Else
combatPassives.customDescription: You have 50% reduced Global Accuracy with Magic, Ranged, or any Melee setup that does not have a stab attack bonus of at least 100.

combatPassives.name: Bonus XP +10%
combatPassives.customDescription: This monster provides 10% bonus combat XP

combatPassives.name: Bonus XP +50%
combatPassives.customDescription: This monster provides 50% bonus combat XP

combatEffects.customDescription: 10% Chance to inflict Bleed100 on hit
10% Chance to inflict Poison on hit
10% Chance to inflict Weakening I on hit (-5% Maximum Hit)

combatPassives.name: Wretched Anger
combatPassives.customDescription: +1% Maximum Hit for every 1% of Hit Points missing.

combatPassives.name: Blighted Aura
combatPassives.customDescription: 25% Chance to inflict Blighted (-10 Maximum Hit, up to 40 Stacks) on hit.

combatPassives.name: Tainted Soul
combatPassives.customDescription: 25% Chance to inflict Tainted (-20% Ranged Evasion, up to 5 Stacks) on hit.

combatPassives.name: Corrupted Heart
combatPassives.customDescription: 25% Chance to apply a 20% Slow for 2 turns on hit.

combatPassives.name: Defiled Body
combatPassives.customDescription: Attacks roll twice and take the higher result.

combatPassives.name: Lycanthrope
combatPassives.customDescription: +50% resistance against Melee and Ranged attacks from non-silver weapons and ammunition.
